## Problem

<!-- What is missing or painful today? Describe the user-facing problem, not a specific solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you would solve it. Be as specific as you can — mock-ups, sketches and examples welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they are weaker. Delete if none. -->

## Scope

- **New game mode**: <!-- yes / no -->
- **Requires backend changes**: <!-- Firestore rules, new collection, RTDB schema -->
- **Accessibility impact**: <!-- screen reader, contrast, motor -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references to other apps or specs. Delete if none. -->
